Maximize Your Federal Benefits

Exclusive Workshop for Hill AFB Federal Employees

📅 Workshop Details

📅 Thursday, April 9, 2026
⏰ 9:00 AM - 11:00 AM
📍 Weber State University - Davis Campus
🎟️ FREE (Limited to 50 Attendees)
🎯 Hill AFB Federal Employees Only

Reserve Your Seat

Join fellow federal employees for this exclusive benefits optimization workshop.

Questions? Call (801) 210-2800

Or text "FEDERAL" to (801) 210-2800

What You'll Learn at This Exclusive Workshop

Our proven 5-step system to maximize every federal benefit for a secure retirement.

📈

FERS Optimization

Calculate your optimal retirement date and discover strategies to maximize your FERS pension payments.

💰

TSP Strategies

Learn the optimal contribution amounts, investment allocation, and withdrawal strategies to maximize your TSP.

🏥

Healthcare Planning

Navigate FEHB, Medicare, and supplement insurance to ensure comprehensive coverage in retirement.

🛡️

FEGLI Analysis

Understand your life insurance options and make informed decisions about continuing coverage.

📊

Social Security Integration

Coordinate Social Security with your federal benefits to maximize total retirement income.

📋

Tax Minimization

Strategic withdrawal sequencing to minimize taxes and maximize your retirement spending power.

Workshop Host

Mike Stevens, CFP®

President & Founder, Capital Wealth Advisors

✓ 25+ years specializing in federal employee benefits
✓ Host of Utah's #1 retirement radio show
✓ Author of "Retire Right, Retire Now"
✓ Helped 1,000+ federal employees maximize their benefits
✓ Manages over $300M in federal retirement assets
"Federal employees have incredible retirement benefits that most financial advisors don't understand. My mission is to help every federal employee maximize these benefits and retire with complete confidence."

Don't Miss This Opportunity
